# sfm_state.md — Sharpe-Fama-Merton Layer Manifold State
<!-- Schema: ADR-014 (4 modules) + ADR-016 (sfm_interface output) -->
<!-- Module 1a auto-generated by carhart_regression.py -->
<!-- Modules 1b-4: template — populate from script outputs + LLM analysis -->
<!-- Last updated: 2026-07-14 -->

# ─── Module 1: Factor Landscape (β'_i · γ) ─────────────────────────

# Module 1a: Carhart Baseline (auto-generated by carhart_regression.py)
carhart_baseline:
  portfolio: 600519.SH,000858.SZ,601318.SH...
  regression_window: 2025-02-11..2026-06-30
  factors:
    MKT: { beta: 0.9531, premia_gamma: 0.001019, significant: true }
    SMB: { beta: -0.1887, premia_gamma: -0.000517, significant: true }
    HML: { beta: -0.0081, premia_gamma: -0.000768, significant: false }
    MOM: { beta: -0.0047, premia_gamma: 0.022674, significant: false }
  residual_alpha: 0.000445
  alpha_t_stat: 1.2075
  alpha_p_value: 0.2280
  r_squared: 0.7163
  adj_r_squared: 0.7131
  information_ratio: 0.0705
  n_observations: 361
  vif_check:
    MKT: 1.0038
    SMB: 1.0013
    HML: 1.0037
    MOM: 1.0015
  computed_at: 2026-07-09T12:07:17.593681

# Module 1b: Factor Duration Spectrum (auto-generated by factor_ic_engine.py)
factor_duration_spectrum:
  short_term:
    - factor: 5d_reversal
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 0.0
      decay_status: stable
    - factor: overnight_gap
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 0.0
      decay_status: stable
    - factor: volume_shock
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 0.0
      decay_status: stable
  medium_term:
    - factor: 12m_momentum
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 70.9
      decay_status: stable
    - factor: 200d_trend
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 0.0
      decay_status: stable
    - factor: earnings_revision
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 30.0
      decay_status: stable
  long_term:
    - factor: value
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 180.0
      decay_status: stable
    - factor: quality
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 0.0
      decay_status: stable
    - factor: low_volatility
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 0.0
      decay_status: stable
    - factor: dividend_yield
      ic_mean: 0.0
      ic_std: 0.0
      half_life_days: 0.0
      decay_status: stable
  computed_at: null

# Module 1c: Extended Premia (auto-generated by options_proxy.py)
extended_premia:
  earnings_revision:
    premia: 0.0
    half_life_days: 30.0
    decay_status: stable
  residual_momentum:
    premia: 0.0
    half_life_days: 45.0
    decay_status: stable
  option_implied_duration:
    proxy_implied_duration: 0.0
    fundamental_duration: 0.0
    divergence: 0.0
    interpretation: "no significant divergence detected"
  computed_at: null


# ─── Module 2: Anomaly Map (α_i) ────────────────────────────────────

# Module 2a: Crowding by Duration (auto-generated by long_short_cost.py)
crowding_by_duration:
  short_term:
    crowding_score: 0.0
    long_short_cost_bps: 0.0
    trend: stable
  medium_term:
    crowding_score: 0.0
    long_short_cost_bps: 0.0
    trend: stable
  long_term:
    crowding_score: 0.0
    long_short_cost_bps: 0.0
    trend: stable
  computed_at: null

# Module 2b: Institutional Constraints
institutional_constraints:
  vol_targeting:
    realized_vol: 0.0
    target_vol: 0.0
    implied_adjustment: neutral
  risk_model_signals:
    momentum_variance_rising: false
    factor_correlation_elevated: false
  net_exposure_trend: stable

# Module 2c: Transient Anomaly
transient_anomaly:
  irrational_deviation: "none detected"
  ic_reversal_risk:
    status: not_yet_inverted
    notes: ""
  option_implied_divergence:
    market_implied: 0.0
    fundamental_estimate: 0.0
    divergence: 0.0


# ─── Module 3: Gradient Estimation ──────────────────────────────────

# Module 3a: Duration Regime Assessment
duration_regime:
  dominant_bucket: neutral
  confidence: 0.3
  fisher_input: stable
  assessment: "gradient unreliable, low-confidence regime"

# Module 3b: Forced Movement Analysis (S4 signal from cffex_scraper.py)
forced_movement:
  s4_futures_signals:
    IF: { net_position_signal: 0, interpretation: "neutral" }
    IH: { net_position_signal: 0, interpretation: "neutral" }
    IC: { net_position_signal: 0, interpretation: "neutral" }
    IM: { net_position_signal: 0, interpretation: "neutral" }
  cross_validation: "no cross-validated signals detected"
  momentum_crash_preconditions:
    market_decline: false
    high_volatility: false
    market_rebound: false
    crash_risk: low
  computed_at: null

# Module 3c: Rotation Path
rotation_path:
  current_state: "no dominant factor"
  target_state: "duration-neutral, hold existing configuration"
  friction: "n/a"
  estimated_transition: "n/a"
  key_risks: []


# ─── Module 4: Composite Output ─────────────────────────────────────
# Synthesizes Modules 1-3 into actionable constraints for Graham/Markowitz
composite_output:
  manifold_state: "no strong signal — low-confidence regime"
  factor_preference:
    conditional_on_fisher:
      ust_continues_declining:
        preferred_factors: []
        avoid: []
        confidence: 0.3
      ust_reverses_rising:
        preferred_factors: []
        avoid: []
        confidence: 0.3
      ust_stable:
        preferred_factors: [no_strong_signal_monitor]
        avoid: []
        confidence: 0.3
  environment_constraints:
    crowding_warnings: []
    duration_guidance: "duration-neutral"
    regime_confidence: 0.3
    holding_period_guidance: "no new positions recommended in low-signal environment"
    risk_budget_modifier: 1.0


# ─── SFM Interface (ADR-016 Graham Interface Contract, ≤400 tokens) ──
# Compressed output for Graham Layer thesis fisher_alignment/sfm_alignment
sfm_interface:
  phase: "neutral"                              # short_favored / medium_favored / long_favored / neutral
  preferred_factors: []                         # ≤ 3 items
  key_signal_1: "IC half-life 70.9d (stable)"  # ≤ 20 tokens, factual
  key_signal_2: "crowding 0.00 (low)"           # ≤ 20 tokens, factual
  gradient_direction: "no_strong_signal"        # ≤ 10 tokens
  confidence: 0.3                                # 0-1 scalar
